ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Mayleneder, Boschetti was a famous jurist, prince of the Eletti Academy in Ferrara and founder of the Operosi Academy also in Ferrara. In 1570 he discussed some `Tesi` which he dedicated to Guido Coccapani and Tommaso Canani.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
